# coolify_server_resources (Data Source)

Retrieves all resources (apps, databases, services) deployed on a Coolify server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_server_resources" "example" {
  server_uuid = "existing-server-uuid"
}

output "resource_names" {
  value = [for r in data.coolify_server_resources.example.resources : r.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the server.

### Read-Only

- `resources` (Attributes List) The list of resources deployed on the server. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--resources))

<a id="nestedatt--resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `resources`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The name of the resource.
- `type` (String) The type of the resource.
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the resource.
